prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约 4866→428→198→150→1917，2021–2024 年呈持续前移趋势（从 4866 名升至 150 名），2025 年因新高考按专业组分档投档，农科类（903 组）位次大幅后移至 1917 名，成为当年校最低位次；近 2 年波动较大，2025 年基准约 1917 名；该校在河南省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021 年 9 人、2022 年 8 人、2023 年 10 人、2024 年 12 人、2025 年 97 人（含农科类大幅扩招），2026 年计划 140 人，较 2025 年扩招约 44%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有较大缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科中国大学排名 2021–2026 年稳定第 4 名，属全国顶尖高校行列；2026 年声誉评价偏负面（学术不端事件 16 条，撤稿量较高），但抖音热度为较热（总排名第 42），整体关注度仍高；2021 年曾出现投档线理科华五倒数第一的异常信号，属低关注度事件，对近年报考心理影响有限；拥有 28 个 A- 及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术 A+、机械工程 A+、材料科学与工程 A+、生物学 A+、临床医学 A+、工商管理 A+ 等，学科实力极强，对高分考生吸引力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业 2024–2026 年持续高热推荐，与交大优势学科高度匹配；河南省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 120 万（含不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约 61% 估算，物理类考生约 73.4 万人，较 2025 年 55.5 万人增加约 32%，竞争加剧；上海交通大学校本部位于上海，属一线城市，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南省招生占比从 2021 年 1.3% 升至 2025 年 16.4%，河南已成为其重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 1917 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 44%（缓解竞争）、河南省物理类考生增加约 32%（加剧竞争）、学校顶尖层次与优势学科持续吸引高分考生、声誉偏负面但关注度仍高等因素，供需弹性主值约 2427 名，结合考生规模增长做有限修正，预测 2026 年最低位次约 2457 名，区间 2177–2737 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 4866→428→198→150→1917 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous upward trend (from rank 4866 to rank 150). In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination's major-group-based filing, the agricultural category (Group 903) saw a significant drop to rank 1917, becoming the university's lowest ranking that year. Fluctuations have been large in the past two years, with a baseline of approximately rank 1917 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Henan Province was 9 students in 2021, 8 in 2022, 10 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 97 in 2025 (including a substantial expansion of the agricultural category). The 2026 plan is 140 students, an increase of about 44% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 4th stably in the Shanghai Ranking of Chinese Universities from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top-tier universities nationwide. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (16 academic misconduct incidents, high retraction volume), but Douyin popularity is relatively hot (ranked 42nd overall), so overall attention remains high. In 2021, there was an abnormal signal of the lowest admission score among the C9 League in science, which was a low-attention event and has limited impact on recent application psychology. It has 28 disciplines rated A- or above, including Computer Science and Technology A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Biology A+, Clinical Medicine A+, Business Administration A+, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering have been consistently hot and recommended from 2024 to 2026, highly matching SJTU's advantageous disciplines. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (including uncertain markers). Estimated based on the recent physics category proportion of about 61%, there are approximately 734,000 physics category candidates, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's main campus is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan Province has risen from 1.3% in 2021 to 16.4% in 2025, making Henan an important source province for students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline rank of 1917, the significant enrollment expansion of about 44% in 2026 (alleviating competition), the increase of about 32% in physics category candidates in Henan Province (intensifying competition), the university's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines continuously attracting high-scoring candidates, the somewhat negative reputation but still high attention, the main supply-demand elasticity value is approximately 2427. With limited correction for candidate population growth, the predicted minimum rank for 2026 is about 2457, with a range of 2177–2737.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Artificial Intelligence (Top-notch Talent Pilot Class)
- Electronic Information (IEEE Pilot Class, including Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- Natural Science Pilot Class (including Chemical Biology, Chemistry, Biotechnology, etc.)
- Natural Conservation and Environmental Ecology (including Dual Degree Program)
- Engineering Pilot Class (including Mechanical, Ocean Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your rank is within the predicted range of 2177–2737, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your rank is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2177), you can focus on applying for top majors in Tier 1 such as the Yongqiang Computer Pilot Class and the Artificial Intelligence Top-notch Talent Class. If your rank is near the upper limit of the range (>2737), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors, aiming to enter SJTU's platform and then adjust your direction through internal transfer or minor programs.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 70→78→76→76→97, fluctuating narrowly between 70 and 97, with a baseline of about 97 in 2025, showing a slight backward trend in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Henan Province was 1 person from 2021 to 2023, increased to 2 in 2024, 1 in 2025, and planned 3 in 2026, a 200% increase compared to 2025, significantly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; stable at 4th place in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier of national universities; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative (many academic misconduct incidents), but Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 42nd), overall attention remains high; no abnormal admissions records for liberal arts; Law A, Foreign Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A, Business Administration A+, etc., highly matching the liberal arts admissions majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has a relatively hot social popularity (recommended), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, estimated at about 39% history category based on recent years, history category candidates about 466,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 352,000 in 2025, intensifying competition; Shanghai is a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal to Henan liberal arts candidates; the university's overall enrollment proportion in Henan Province rose from 1.3% in 2021 to 16.4% in 2025, making Henan an important source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 97, the 2026 enrollment plan expanding from 1 to 3 (+200%, significantly easing competition), the increase in history category candidates in Henan Province by about 32% (intensifying competition), the university's top-tier level continuing to attract high-scoring candidates, and the relatively hot popularity of the Law major, the main supply-demand elasticity value is about 213, with limited correction for candidate scale growth, predicting the 2026 minimum ranking to be about 228, with a range of 178–278.
